title: Breaking Bad
creator: Vince Gilligan
synopsis: A dying chemistry teacher transforms into a ruthless drug kingpin, dismantling every value he once held in pursuit of legacy.

title: The Wire
creator: David Simon
synopsis: Baltimore's institutions — police, drug trade, docks, politics, schools — collapse together in the most novelistic show ever made.

title: Chernobyl
creator: Craig Mazin
synopsis: The true story of the 1986 nuclear disaster and the human cost of the Soviet cover-up that nearly made it catastrophic.

title: Succession
creator: Jesse Armstrong
synopsis: The Roy family's war over a global media empire reveals that wealth doesn't grant power — only the proximity to it.

title: Fleabag
creator: Phoebe Waller-Bridge
synopsis: A dry-witted, grief-stricken woman navigates family dysfunction and an impossible crush on a Catholic priest.

title: Arcane
creator: Christian Linke & Alex Yee
synopsis: Two sisters are torn apart by the political divide between a gleaming city and its oppressed underground in this stunning animated series.

title: Better Call Saul
creator: Vince Gilligan & Peter Gould
synopsis: The prequel to Breaking Bad: the slow, heartbreaking transformation of small-time lawyer Jimmy McGill into Saul Goodman.

title: Severance
creator: Dan Erickson
synopsis: Employees at Lumon Industries have their work and personal memories surgically split — and the two halves begin uncovering each other's secrets.

title: Shogun
creator: Rachel Kondo & Caillin Puccio
synopsis: An English navigator crash-lands in feudal Japan and becomes an unwitting pawn in a power struggle between rival warlords.

title: The Bear
creator: Christopher Storer
synopsis: A Michelin-trained chef returns home to run his family's sandwich shop in Chicago, finding that the kitchen is the easiest thing to manage.

title: Andor
creator: Tony Gilroy
synopsis: The formation of the Rebel Alliance, told through the eyes of reluctant revolutionary Cassian Andor — the grittiest Star Wars story.

title: Mindhunter
creator: Joe Penhall
synopsis: Two FBI agents pioneer criminal profiling by interviewing jailed serial killers in the late 1970s, and slowly lose perspective.

title: Dark
creator: Baran bo Odar & Jantje Friese
synopsis: Four interconnected families in a German town unravel a time-travel conspiracy that spans across multiple centuries.

title: Mr. Robot
creator: Sam Esmail
synopsis: A hacker with dissociative identity disorder is recruited to bring down a global corporation — and unravels something far deeper.

title: The Americans
creator: Joe Weisberg
synopsis: Two deep-cover Soviet spies pose as a married couple in 1980s Washington D.C. while their marriage becomes its own Cold War.

title: Watchmen
creator: Damon Lindelof
synopsis: A masked police detective in Tulsa uncovers a white-supremacist conspiracy that connects to masked vigilantes and the legacy of 1921.

title: The White Lotus
creator: Mike White
synopsis: Vacationing guests at a luxury resort reveal the violence underneath wealth and privilege in a pitch-perfect dark satire.

title: Barry
creator: Bill Hader & Alec Berg
synopsis: A depressed hitman stumbles into a community theatre class in Los Angeles and desperately tries to become an actor.

title: Twin Peaks: The Return
creator: David Lynch & Mark Frost
synopsis: Agent Dale Cooper returns to Twin Peaks after 25 years — and David Lynch uses him to make one of the most singular works in TV history.

title: Game of Thrones
creator: David Benioff & D.B. Weiss
synopsis: Noble families clash for the Iron Throne while an ancient evil awakens in the north — extraordinary for six seasons.

title: True Detective
creator: Nic Pizzolatto
synopsis: Anthology crime series; Season 1 — two Louisiana detectives haunt each other across 17 years of a serial murder investigation.

title: Peaky Blinders
creator: Steven Knight
synopsis: Tommy Shelby builds a criminal empire from the back streets of post-WWI Birmingham in this intensely stylised gangster epic.

title: Atlanta
creator: Donald Glover
synopsis: Two cousins navigate the Atlanta rap scene in a show that shapeshifts between naturalism, horror, and surrealism episode to episode.

title: The Office
creator: Greg Daniels
synopsis: A mockumentary about the everyday lives of office workers at the Scranton branch of a paper company, led by the world's most oblivious boss.

title: The Leftovers
creator: Damon Lindelof & Tom Perrotta
synopsis: Three years after 2% of the global population suddenly disappears, the survivors grieve, unravel, and search for meaning.

title: Fargo
creator: Noah Hawley
synopsis: An anthology of Coen Brothers-inspired crime in the American Midwest — dark, funny, and often deeply strange.

title: Narcos
creator: Chris Brancato
synopsis: The true story of DEA agents hunting Pablo Escobar as his cocaine empire reshapes Colombia and corrupts everything it touches.

title: Halt and Catch Fire
creator: Christopher Cantwell & Christopher C. Rogers
synopsis: A rogue visionary and two engineers build personal computers in early 1980s Texas in a show about creativity, loss, and the cost of ambition.

title: The Handmaid's Tale
creator: Bruce Miller
synopsis: In the totalitarian theocracy of Gilead, a woman forced into sexual servitude finds ways to resist and survive.

title: Ozark
creator: Bill Dubuque & Mark Williams
synopsis: A Chicago financial advisor launders money for a drug cartel in the Missouri Ozarks while his family disintegrates around him.

title: Killing Eve
creator: Phoebe Waller-Bridge
synopsis: An MI5 officer becomes obsessed with tracking a charismatic assassin — and the assassin becomes equally obsessed with her.

title: Schitt's Creek
creator: Dan Levy & Eugene Levy
synopsis: A wealthy family loses everything and is forced to live in a small town they once bought as a joke — and slowly find themselves.

title: House of the Dragon
creator: Ryan Condal & George R.R. Martin
synopsis: The civil war of House Targaryen tears the Seven Kingdoms apart in a prequel that captures early Game of Thrones' political dread.

title: Invincible
creator: Robert Kirkman
synopsis: A teenage superhero discovers his father is the most powerful villain on Earth in a brutally violent and emotionally honest animated series.

title: Silo
creator: Graham Yost
synopsis: In an underground silo housing humanity's last survivors, a sheriff investigates the lies built into their world's foundations.

title: Ted Lasso
creator: Jason Sudeikis & Bill Lawrence
synopsis: An impossibly optimistic American football coach is hired to manage an English Premier League club and wins everyone over through kindness.

title: Station Eleven
creator: Patrick Somerville
synopsis: After a flu pandemic collapses civilisation, a travelling troupe of actors performs Shakespeare twenty years later — and something hunts them.

title: What We Do in the Shadows
creator: Jemaine Clement
synopsis: A documentary crew follows three vampire flatmates and their energy vampire familiar as they struggle with modern life in Staten Island.

title: Only Murders in the Building
creator: Steve Martin & John Hoffman
synopsis: Three strangers obsessed with true crime podcasts team up to investigate a murder in their Upper West Side apartment building.

title: Sharp Objects
creator: Marti Noxon
synopsis: A journalist with a traumatic past returns to her small Missouri hometown to cover the murders of two young girls.

title: Slow Horses
creator: Will Smith
synopsis: A team of disgraced MI5 agents under a brilliantly awful spymaster keep stumbling into real threats no one else will touch.

title: Reservation Dogs
creator: Sterlin Harjo & Taika Waititi
synopsis: Four Native American teenagers in rural Oklahoma scheme to escape to California and get into deadpan, grief-soaked trouble.

title: Abbott Elementary
creator: Quinta Brunson
synopsis: A group of teachers navigate a chronically underfunded Philadelphia public school with more optimism than the system deserves.

title: Yellowjackets
creator: Ashley Lyle & Bart Nickerson
synopsis: A girls' soccer team crashes in the Canadian wilderness and survives — twenty-five years later, the survivors know what really happened.

title: Industry
creator: Mickey Down & Konrad Kay
synopsis: Young graduates compete for permanent jobs at a London investment bank, surviving on drugs, ambition, and recklessness.

title: The Last of Us
creator: Craig Mazin & Neil Druckmann
synopsis: A smuggler escorts a teenage girl immune to a fungal pandemic across a ruined America — a meditation on love and what it costs.

title: Beef
creator: Lee Sung Jin
synopsis: A road-rage incident between two strangers in LA escalates into a full-scale psychological war that dismantles both their lives.

title: Detectorists
creator: Mackenzie Crook
synopsis: Two metal detector enthusiasts in the Essex countryside search for buried treasure and find something more valuable instead.

title: Poker Face
creator: Rian Johnson
synopsis: A woman with an uncanny ability to detect lies roams the US in a beat-up car, getting tangled in a new murder mystery each week.

title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
creator: Michael Schur & Dan Goor
synopsis: Jake Peralta, an immature but talented detective, navigates the eccentricities of the NYPD's 99th precinct.
